skills.name: clawbar-dev-loop
skills.purpose: Auto rebuild and relaunch the local Clawbar app while editing Swift sources or tests.

skills.name: clawbar-menubar-screenshot
skills.purpose: Open the live menubar popup and capture a reproducible screenshot artifact.

skills.name: clawbar-menubar-verify
skills.purpose: Run an Accessibility-driven verification pass against the live menubar popup.

skills.name: clawbar-openclaw-logs
skills.purpose: Collect the current Clawbar and OpenClaw runtime logs into a single diagnostics bundle for troubleshooting.

skills.name: clawbar-package-dmg
skills.purpose: Package the current Clawbar checkout into a local DMG artifact, with an optional signed and notarized release path.
